html:
Exclusive to:  

The Rain Coat is a craftable Dress Item. It requires 2 Tentacle Spots, 2 Rope, and 2 Bone Shards to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

When worn during Rain, the player's Wetness will not increase at all. Additionally, it insulates the player against Lightning strikes and the electric shocks of a charged Volt Goat. Rain Coats are tier 1 warm clothing, providing 60 insulation from Freezing.

Rain Coats last for 10 days and a Sewing Kit will repair 50% of its durability.


Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Horned Gumshoe Poncho
Stay dry while sleuthing.
Woven - Elegant
Parlor's Collection
Outlaw Poncho
Stay one step ahead of the rain.

Tips

  • The Rain Coat is a viable item to wear helmets such as Miner Hat while equipping tools or weapons without getting wet.
  • When fighting Moslings, the Rain Coat can be handy to protect against the frequent lightning strikes that will occur, while still allowing armor to be equipped in the head slot.
  • One might not benefit from the Rain Coat fully, as it's usually more efficient to wear other wetness-resistant equipment, such as an Eyebrella; and wear a Backpack or an Armor piece instead.

Assets

Rain CoatGumshoe PonchoOutlaw Poncho

Rain Coat
"A waterproof coat to keep you dry."
Object Info
Perk
Protects from rain and lightning.
Delays freezing during Winter.
10 days

Does not stack

100% resistance
60

"raincoat"
Exclusive to:
“Keeps the rain where it ought to be. Outside my body.”
–Wilson
“This'll do the trick.”
–Willow
“Dry is nice.”
–Wolfgang
“I liked jumping in puddles with Abigail.”
–Wendy
“PERFECT PROTECTION AT THE COST OF AN INCOMPLETE CIRCUIT”
–WX-78
“Totally non-porous.”
–Wickerbottom
“For chopping in the rain.”
–Woodie
“Out, out, rain!”
–Maxwell
“An excellent insulator of moisture and electrostatic charge.”
–Wagstaff
“Armör för rain.”
–Wigfrid
“We might look silly, but it'll keep our fur dry.”
–Webber
“The surf can't touch me now!”
–Walani
“For a foggy Paris evening.”
–Warly
“Keeps me blouse dry.”
–Woodlegs
“IT KEEP'TH WILBA DRY”
–Wilba
“Rain Taker Coat”
–Wormwood
“Alright rain, hit me with your best shot!”
–Wheeler
“Very practical.”
–Winona
“The puddles wait out there for me!”
–Wortox
“Why scale-less so scared of rain?”
–Wurt
“Gotta be prepared for the elements!”
–Walter
“It keeps me warm and dry.”
–Wanda

When worn during Rain, the player's Wetness will not increase at all. Additionally, it insulates the player against Lightning strikes and the electric shocks of a charged Volt Goat. Rain Coats are tier 1 warm clothing, providing 60 insulation from Freezing.
Rain Coats last for 10 days and a Sewing Kit will repair 50% of its durability.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Áo Mưa là một trang phục có thể chế tạo được. Nó cần 2 Điểm xúc tu, 2 Dây thừng và 2 Mảnh xương để chế tạo và Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu.
